ProblemSolution.label: The Problem

HowItWorks.title: Three Steps to Total Control
HowItWorks.subtitle: Get up and running in days, not months.

1.title: Connect Your Team
1.desc: Invite your engineers, accountants, and project managers to one shared workspace.

2.title: Import Project Data
2.desc: Upload your BOQ, budget, and inventory lists instantly.

3.title: Start Tracking
3.desc: Issue POs, record daily progress, and watch your dashboard update in real-time.
